entities.label: Release button and press start button
Release door release button before ordering start

relations.head: Alarm 1001
relations.evidence: Indicates that the punch button has been pressed

relations.head: Alarm 1001
relations.evidence: operator/maintenance officer

relations.head: Alarm 1001
relations.tail: Release button and press start button
relations.evidence: Release the button and press the start button on the machine.

relations.head: Alarm 1002
relations.evidence: Indicates that the power circuits have not been activated, in this condition the machine cannot operate in any way.

relations.head: Alarm 1002
relations.evidence: operator/maintenance officer

relations.head: Alarm 1002
relations.evidence: Press the machine start button.

relations.head: Alarm 1003
relations.evidence: At the start of the cycle the sliding door is open.

relations.head: Alarm 1003
relations.evidence: operator/maintenance officer

relations.head: Alarm 1003
relations.evidence: Check that the door is in an acceptable condition.

relations.head: Alarm 1004
relations.evidence: At the start of the cycle the sliding door is not in working condition.

relations.head: Alarm 1004
relations.evidence: operator

relations.head: Alarm 1004
relations.tail: Release door release button before ordering start
relations.evidence: Release the door release button before ordering the start of the cycle.

relations.head: Alarm 1005
relations.evidence: The side protections are open.

relations.head: Alarm 1005
relations.evidence: operator/maintenance officer

relations.head: Alarm 1005
relations.evidence: Check that the side protections are closed, check for any possible rusting.

relations.head: Alarm 1008
relations.evidence: A thermal switch on the motors was triggered.

relations.head: Alarm 1008
relations.evidence: operator/maintenance officer

relations.head: Alarm 1008
relations.evidence: Check and reset circuit breakers and/or thermomagnetic switches.

relations.head: Alarm 1009
relations.evidence: A thermal switch on the motors was triggered.

relations.head: Alarm 1009
relations.evidence: operator/maintenance officer

relations.head: Alarm 1009
relations.evidence: Check and reset circuit breakers and/or thermomagnetic switches.

relations.head: Alarm 1011
relations.evidence: Insufficient quantity of coolant in the water circuit: wise of the linear motor.

relations.head: Alarm 1011
relations.evidence: operator/maintenance officer

relations.head: Alarm 1011
relations.evidence: Check the liquid level in the watering circuit.

relations.head: Alarm 1012
relations.evidence: The refrigerator cannot lower the engine temperature linear.

relations.head: Alarm 1012
relations.evidence: operator/maintenance officer

relations.head: Alarm 1012
relations.evidence: Check the correct operation of the refrigerator compressor.

relations.head: Alarm 1013
relations.evidence: Hardware problems with axes and spindles.

relations.head: Alarm 1013
relations.evidence: operator/maintenance officer

relations.head: Alarm 1013
relations.evidence: Note the power supply error code marked A2831 and consult the Fanuc 160i-TB CNC service manual for more information.
